static_proof.notes: Governance-only lane. No code changes. Grounded in UTV2-849 (source_separated_pct=100%, picks_source_has_check_constraint=true, model_generated_pct=0%) and UTV2-850 (6 champion registry entries: MLB/NBA/NHL × game_line/player_prop; pick_candidates has model_score/model_tier/model_confidence but no model_registry_id; 4202 picks with 0% model attribution).

sections: 2. Ownership Persistence Contract (origin, storage, immutability, propagation)

key_findings.exact_gap: pick_candidates.model_registry_id FK is never written at candidate scoring time, despite model_score being written
key_findings.ownership_origin: candidate scoring — atomic write with model_score
key_findings.ownership_propagation: join chain: picks → pick_candidates → model_registry (no FK duplication across tables)
key_findings.minimal_migration_1: ADD COLUMN pick_candidates.model_registry_id UUID REFERENCES model_registry(id), scoring_run_id UUID, ownership_timestamp TIMESTAMPTZ
key_findings.minimal_migration_2: ADD COLUMN model_registry.registry_entity_type, source_type_compatibility, owner, training_window_*, validation_metrics, calibration_metadata, promotion_approved_*
key_findings.code_change: At model_score write time, look up model_registry.id for sport+market_family+champion and write it atomically

summary.root_cause: Scoring already runs — model_score, model_tier, model_confidence are written to pick_candidates. The 6 champion registry entries exist and cover the relevant sports/markets. The gap is exactly one missing atomic write: model_registry_id is never persisted alongside model_score. This is a single FK column addition + one code change to the scanner write path.
summary.resolution: Model ownership persistence standard written. Full lifecycle chain defined from candidate scoring through recap/reporting. Ownership propagates via join (not duplicated columns). Minimal migration set documented. Codex investigation + planning packet included. No migrations added in this pass.
unblocks: Codex investigation pass to find scanner write path
Operator approval of migration_1 (pick_candidates FK) and migration_2 (model_registry additions)
Implementation lane that adds the FK and code change
UTV2-851 (unsupported-market quarantine) — can proceed in parallel
